dashboard_first_visit_message: Welcome! Ready to learn your first words in {language}? Pick a format below or start with new vocabulary.
dashboard_nothing_due_message: Nothing to review today — a good moment to learn something new.
dashboard_reset_profile_confirm: Reset everything? This deletes your profile, cards and history.
dashboard_you_have_n_cards_due: You have {count} cards due. Want to clear the queue?
error_default_message: Something went wrong. Try reloading the page or head back home.
error_not_found_message: We could not find the page you were looking for.
format_new_vocab_description: Introduce fresh vocabulary tuned to your interests.
format_reading_description: A short passage and comprehension questions.
format_review_description: Cards that are due today, drawn from your history.
onboarding_error_pick_different_language: Pick two different languages to continue.
onboarding_step1_description: Choose the language you speak and the one you want to learn.
onboarding_step2_description: CEFR level for the language you are learning — this calibrates difficulty.
onboarding_step3_description: Pick interests and lesson formats you enjoy.
progress_description: Local view of your streak, due queue and per-card mastery.
progress_no_mastered_yet: Keep practising — mastered items will show up here.
session_action_another_example_message: Give me another example of this, please.
session_action_done_message: I'm done with this writing. Please review it and give detailed feedback.
session_action_done_reading_message: I've finished reading. Please ask the comprehension questions.
session_action_dont_know_message: I don't know this one. Mark it as Again and move on.
session_action_help_start_message: I'm not sure how to start. Could you give me a sentence-starter or a few key words?
session_action_hint_message: Could you give me a hint, please? Don't reveal the answer.
session_action_rule_message: Briefly explain the grammar rule this exercise tests.
session_action_skip_message: Skip this exercise — do not grade it, just move to the next one.
session_action_stuck_message: I'm stuck. Can you suggest how to continue this piece?
session_action_translate_message: Translate the word or phrase I just mentioned, please.
session_send_label: Send a message to the tutor
session_tutor_intro: Hi! Let's begin a "{format}" session. Please start with the first exercise.
